sections.content:

<function=python>
<parameter=code>
# Select the green entity at cols 12-14 (above dark frame)
action([{'action': 'MOUSE', 'row': 31, 'col': 13}])

# Move it DOWN into the dark frame
action(['DOWN'])

ascii_lines = current_frame.ascii.split('\n')
print("After DOWN (rows 30-38, cols 8-20):")
for i in range(30, 39):
    print(f"  row {i}: {ascii_lines[i][8:20]}")

seg = current_frame.segmentation
for n in seg['nodes']:
    if n['color'] == 'N' and n['pixels'] == 8:
        print(f"  Green: id={n['id']}, boundary={n['boundary']}, children={n['children']}")

print(f"\nResult: {last_action_result}")
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>
